meaning: n.[植]吉纳紫檀(产于北非、印度和锡兰等地),(欧洲的)电影院(kinematograph的缩写)
examples: Kino had found the Pearl of the World.
Kino has found the Pearl of the World.
So the successful slapstick comedy Kino started up.
"My family and I don't have any problem with this, " says Makiko Kino, mother to three small boys.
FirstLook Studios, Kino, and Magnolia Pictures are among the independent studios offering films for sale on VUDU in HD.
